[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline 20TH F1TENTH AUTONOMOUS GRAND Prix

##### Timeline is subject to change. Please follow announcements in our slack channel for the latest updates.

DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
June 6th |  Registration Opens  
July 23rd | [F1tenth Orientation 1 ( Competition Rules overview )](https://stanford.zoom.us/j/4680204802?pwd=SFQzV1Vzc1NBci9pNDJLRHJLcGZxQT09)  
[Slide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/10ppWPOif0lmOj4xoRRCkcsY-sDGpdhf6/view?usp=drive_link) [Video](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cmmRzmfXXLmSbnrdTn0hcjWu2bpM3C46/view?usp=sharing)  
August 18th | Registration Closes  
August 20th | F1tenth Orientation 2 ( Track set up, Track overview for in-person competition, Teams Training )  
September 24th | Track Setup  
September 25th | Open Training  
September 26th | Qualification Session  
September 27th | Knockout Races & Award Ceremony
